controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons through a
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that whenever necessary, Reserve Bank
shall issue directions to Authorised Persons through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amended suitably simultaneously
controls.control_description:
The Master Direction issued herewith shall be amended suitably
simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended suitably simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be received under rupee drawing arrangements (rdas) through the rupee vostro account of exchange houses situated in gulf countries, hong kong, si
controls.control_description:
Introduction
Cross-border inward remittances may also be received under Rupee Drawing
Arrangements (RDAs) through the Rupee Vostro Account of Exchange Houses
situated in Gulf countries, Hong Kong, Singapore, Malaysia (for Malaysia only
under Speed Remittance Procedure) and all other countries which are FATF
compliant (for all other countries which are FATF compliant only under Speed
Remittance Procedure).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be received under rupee drawing arrangements (rdas) through the rupee vostro account of exchange houses situated in gulf countries, hong kong, si

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the concerned regional office of the reserve bank in the prescribed form with necessary documents for the first time they enter into rdas wit
controls.control_description:
General Instructions
AD Category-I banks should apply to the concerned Regional Office of the Reserve
Bank in the prescribed form with necessary documents for the first time they enter
into RDAs with non-resident Exchange Houses from Gulf countries, Hong Kong,
Singapore, Malaysia and all other countries which are FATF compliant, for opening
and maintaining in India the Rupee vostro accounts of those non-resident
Exchange Houses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the concerned regional office of the reserve bank in the prescribed form with necessary documents for the first time they enter into rdas wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into rdas
controls.control_description:
Subsequently, they may enter into RDAs, subject to the
prescribed guidelines and inform the Reserve Bank immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into rdas

controls.control_objective: To ensure cause a detailed external audit of their internal system to ensure that it is working satisfactorily
controls.control_description:
However, once
the total number of RDAs reaches twenty, the AD Category-I bank may cause a
detailed external audit of their internal system to ensure that it is working
satisfactorily.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cause a detailed external audit of their internal system to ensure that it is working satisfactorily

controls.control_objective: To ensure authorize more such arrangements
controls.control_description:
Based on the satisfactory report, the Board of AD Category-I banks
may authorize more such arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to authorize more such arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be filed with the reserve bank and new arrangements informed to the reserve bank immediately
controls.control_description:
A copy of the Board Note together with
Board Resolution in the matter may be filed with the Reserve Bank and new
arrangements informed to the Reserve Bank immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be filed with the reserve bank and new arrangements informed to the reserve bank immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be opened by the ad category i banks subject to the following conditions:
controls.control_description:
Rupee/ foreign currency
vostro accounts of non-resident Exchange Houses in India may be opened by the
AD Category I banks subject to the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be opened by the ad category i banks subject to the following conditions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure make necessary enquiries about the financial standing of the exchange house, in accordance with the normal banking practices and satisfy themselves fu
controls.control_description:
(a) While considering the request of an Exchange House for opening an account in
India, the AD Category-I banks concerned should make necessary
enquiries about the financial standing of the Exchange House, in accordance
with the normal banking practices and satisfy themselves fully in all
respects.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make necessary enquiries about the financial standing of the exchange house, in accordance with the normal banking practices and satisfy themselves fu

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that the exchange houses hold valid licenses issued by the local monetary/ supervisory authority concerned and have necessary authority /
controls.control_description:
AD Category-I banks should also ensure that the Exchange Houses
hold valid licenses issued by the Local Monetary/ Supervisory Authority
concerned and have necessary authority / license to transact currency
exchange/ money transfer business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that the exchange houses hold valid licenses issued by the local monetary/ supervisory authority concerned and have necessary authority /

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to comprehensive legal documentation and ad category-i banks should take care of all necessary legal requirements in this regard
controls.control_description:
However, such
arrangements should be subjected to comprehensive legal documentation and
AD Category-I banks should take care of all necessary legal requirements in
this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to comprehensive legal documentation and ad category-i banks should take care of all necessary legal requirements in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that all the partners of the exchange houses are jointly and severally bound to honour the obligations devolving on the exchange houses und
controls.control_description:
Further, it should be ensured that all the partners of the Exchange
Houses are jointly and severally bound to honour the obligations devolving on
the Exchange Houses under the agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that all the partners of the exchange houses are jointly and severally bound to honour the obligations devolving on the exchange houses und

controls.control_objective: To ensure be observed
controls.control_description:
(c) The normal banking requirements of registration of Power of Attorney/
specimen signatures of signing officials of the Exchange Houses should be
observed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be observed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be individuals barring a few exceptions
controls.control_description:
The remitter and the beneficiary should be
individuals barring a few exceptions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be individuals barring a few exceptions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for cross-border outward remittances from india
controls.control_description:
The accounts should not be used for
cross-border outward remittances from India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for cross-border outward remittances from india

controls.control_objective: To ensure run on a credit basis
controls.control_description: (b) The accounts should run on a credit basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to run on a credit basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted to the account holders
controls.control_description:
No overdraft should be granted to
the account holders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted to the account holders

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account
controls.control_description:
However, in case of Designated Depository Agency (DDA)
procedure, the funds lying in the DDA A/c may be taken into account, if need
be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt value dating where on-line debit to rupee vostro account is not possible on a real time basis when any payment is made at drawee branches, to ch
controls.control_description:
AD Category-I banks shall adopt value dating where on-line debit to Rupee
vostro account is not possible on a real time basis when any payment is made
at drawee branches, to check adequacy of funds and detect concealed
overdrafts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt value dating where on-line debit to rupee vostro account is not possible on a real time basis when any payment is made at drawee branches, to ch

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the drawee branches are networked at the earliest
controls.control_description:
However, in such cases, it may be ensured that the drawee
branches are networked at the earliest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the drawee branches are networked at the earliest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained for each arrangement
controls.control_description: (c) Separate Rupee vostro account shall be maintained for each arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained for each arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be funded by sale of permitted foreign currency to the ad category-i bank, which maintains the account
controls.control_description:
The
accounts should be funded by sale of permitted foreign currency to the AD
Category-I bank, which maintains the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be funded by sale of permitted foreign currency to the ad category-i bank, which maintains the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed freely and given the same status as remittances made in foreign exchange in an approved manner to india
controls.control_description:
(d) Debits of permitted types of inward remittances [vide item 3(a) above] may be
allowed freely and given the same status as remittances made in foreign
exchange in an approved manner to India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed freely and given the same status as remittances made in foreign exchange in an approved manner to india

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue certificates in the same form as obtaining for inward remittances received through rupee accounts of overseas banks
controls.control_description:
In
order to facilitate tourists (whether Indian or not), receiving remittances through
such accounts to prove the external sources of the funds wherever required
(such as for payment of passages in India or for re-conversion of unutilised
balances), AD Category-I banks may issue certificates in the same form as
obtaining for inward remittances received through Rupee accounts of overseas
banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue certificates in the same form as obtaining for inward remittances received through rupee accounts of overseas banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure reconcile the accounts before effecting the closure
controls.control_description:
However, the AD Category I bank may reconcile the accounts
before effecting the closure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reconcile the accounts before effecting the closure

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the foreign currency outflow in statement 'e'
controls.control_description:
Further, the AD Category I banks may report the
foreign currency outflow in Statement 'E'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the foreign currency outflow in statement 'e'

controls.control_objective: To ensure credit to the account, rupees purchased by the latter unless confirmation is received to the effect that the nostro account of the ad category-i bank
controls.control_description:
(g) The branch of the AD Category-I bank maintaining the Rupee vostro account
of the Exchange House should not credit to the account, rupees purchased by
the latter unless confirmation is received to the effect that the nostro account of
the AD Category-I bank has been credited with the counter-value in foreign
currency (cf.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to credit to the account, rupees purchased by the latter unless confirmation is received to the effect that the nostro account of the ad category-i bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain suitable and adequate collateral either in the form of a cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency or guarantee of a bank of internation
controls.control_description:
(h) AD Category-I banks may obtain suitable and adequate collateral either in the
form of a cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency or guarantee of a
bank of international repute, depending on the type of arrangement to take care
of the credit and operational risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain suitable and adequate collateral either in the form of a cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency or guarantee of a bank of internation

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame their own policy in this regard2
controls.control_description:
They may frame their own policy in this
regard2.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame their own policy in this regard2

controls.control_objective: To ensure 1 inserted on may 19, 2017 2 inserted vide a
controls.control_description:
However, AD Category-I banks may
1 Inserted on May 19, 2017 2 Inserted vide A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 1 inserted on may 19, 2017 2 inserted vide a

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain necessary board approval before increasing the number of drawee branches beyond 300 and should inform the position to the reserve bank immediat
controls.control_description:
The AD Category-I banks should obtain necessary Board approval before
increasing the number of drawee branches beyond 300 and should inform the
position to the Reserve Bank immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain necessary board approval before increasing the number of drawee branches beyond 300 and should inform the position to the reserve bank immediat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be routed through the exchange houses
controls.control_description:
Under no circumstances,
donations / contributions to charitable institutions should be routed
through the Exchange Houses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be routed through the exchange houses

controls.control_objective: To ensure opt for the non-dda procedure
controls.control_description:
(a) As an alternative to maintaining a DDA account and appointment of auditors as
above, the AD Category-I banks may opt for the Non-DDA procedure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to opt for the non-dda procedure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description:
(c) Collateral Cover for Non-DDA: For Exchange Houses which have not
completed three years of operation, collateral cover in cash deposit in any
convertible foreign currency or guarantee from a bank of international repute
equivalent to 7 days' projected drawings may be obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained from exchange houses
controls.control_description:
Further, under Non-DDA arrangement, a collateral
cover in cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency or guarantee from a
bank of international repute equivalent to 10 days' projected drawings may be
obtained from Exchange Houses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained from exchange houses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description:
In addition to the above, if there is a
restriction on the bank's right to depute its own staff for examination of books of
the Exchange House, as was in case of Exchange Houses in Kuwait, additional
cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency / guarantee from a bank of
international repute equivalent to 15 days' estimated drawings may be
obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in the name of the ad category-i bank with interest thereon at market related rates payable to the exchange house placing the deposits
controls.control_description:
The deposit should be in the name of the AD Category-I bank with
interest thereon at market related rates payable to the Exchange House placing
the deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in the name of the ad category-i bank with interest thereon at market related rates payable to the exchange house placing the deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be periodically reviewed and properly monitored by the ad category-i banks to ensure that the collateral adequately covers the drawings and account fo
controls.control_description:
The amount of deposit and guarantee should be periodically
reviewed and properly monitored by the AD Category-I banks to ensure that the
collateral adequately covers the drawings and account for the pipeline debits
evaluated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be periodically reviewed and properly monitored by the ad category-i banks to ensure that the collateral adequately covers the drawings and account fo

controls.control_objective: To ensure fund the rupee account through the nostro account of the ad category-i bank in advance before issuing payment instructions and on verification of data
controls.control_description:
7(ii) Ordinarily, the Exchange House should fund the Rupee account through
the nostro account of the AD Category-I bank in advance before issuing
payment instructions and on verification of data and availability of
balances in the vostro account of the exchange house the AD Category-I
bank issues drafts in favour of the beneficiary or credits the account of the
beneficiary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fund the rupee account through the nostro account of the ad category-i bank in advance before issuing payment instructions and on verification of data

controls.control_objective: To ensure open a separate rupee account with the prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
8(iii) Where facility of speed remittance is extended to existing Rupee drawing
arrangements, the Exchange House shall open a separate Rupee
account with the prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open a separate rupee account with the prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed in the matter immediately
controls.control_description:
However, the Reserve Bank should be informed in the matter
immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be informed in the matter immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure open a separate rupee account with the prior approval of the reserve bank and no payment instructions shall be executed unless there are clear funds a
controls.control_description:
Prior to the replacement it read as:
"Where facility of speed remittance is extended to existing Rupee drawing arrangements, the Exchange House shall open a separate Rupee account with the prior approval of the Reserve Bank and no payment instructions shall be executed unless there are clear funds available in this account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open a separate rupee account with the prior approval of the reserve bank and no payment instructions shall be executed unless there are clear funds a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed in the matter immediately
controls.control_description: However, the Reserve Bank should be informed in the matter immediately." 9 Replaced vide A.P.(DIR Series) Circular No.66 dated April 28, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be informed in the matter immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description:
Prior to the replacement it read as:
"Collateral Cover for Speed Remittance Arrangement: For Exchange Houses, which have not completed three years of operation, collateral cover in cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency or guarantee from a bank of international repute equivalent to 7 days' projected drawings may be obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep with the ad category-i bank an additional cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency or guarantee from a bank of international repute equiv
controls.control_description: Further, the Exchange House shall keep with the AD Category-I bank an additional cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency or guarantee from a bank of international repute equivalent to 1 day's estimated drawings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep with the ad category-i bank an additional cash deposit in any convertible foreign currency or guarantee from a bank of international repute equiv

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in track record of the exchange house, whether the remittances are effected on gross (real-time) or net (file transfer) basis, etc
controls.control_description:
The deposit should be in
track record of the Exchange House, whether the remittances are effected on
gross (real-time) or net (file transfer) basis, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be in track record of the exchange house, whether the remittances are effected on gross (real-time) or net (file transfer) basis, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame their own policy in this regard
controls.control_description:
and may frame their own
policy in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame their own policy in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into foreign currency drawing arrangements under dda or non-dda procedure with those exchange houses with whom they have rupee drawing arrangements (rdas), with prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Foreign Currency Drawing Arrangements
AD Category-I banks may enter into foreign currency drawing arrangements under
DDA or Non-DDA procedure with those Exchange Houses with whom they have
Rupee Drawing Arrangements (RDAs), with prior approval of the Reserve Bank,
subject to the following conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into foreign currency drawing arrangements under dda or non-dda procedure with those exchange houses with whom they have rupee drawing arrangements (rdas), with prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure draw drafts in any convertible foreign currency on 'a' or 'b' category branches of ad category-i bank
controls.control_description:
(a) Exchange Houses shall draw drafts in any convertible foreign currency on 'A' or
'B' category branches of AD Category-I bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to draw drafts in any convertible foreign currency on 'a' or 'b' category branches of ad category-i bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept distinct from the rupee drawing arrangement
controls.control_description:
(b) The foreign currency drawing arrangement shall be kept distinct from the
Rupee drawing arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept distinct from the rupee drawing arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be opened with the account maintaining branch
controls.control_description:
(c) A separate foreign currency vostro account of the Exchange House shall be
opened with the account maintaining branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be opened with the account maintaining branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made by debit to this account maintained by the exchange house and not to the nostro account of the ad category-i bank
controls.control_description:
Payment of such drafts shall be
made by debit to this account maintained by the Exchange House and not to
the nostro Account of the AD Category-I bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made by debit to this account maintained by the exchange house and not to the nostro account of the ad category-i bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited to the nostro account of the drawee bank latest by close of business on the second working day
controls.control_description:
(d) The aggregate amount of drafts drawn in foreign currency by the Exchange
House on any day should be credited to the nostro Account of the drawee bank
latest by close of business on the second working day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited to the nostro account of the drawee bank latest by close of business on the second working day

controls.control_objective: To ensure credit foreign currency vostro account of the exchange house on receipt of confirmation regarding credit to their nostro account
controls.control_description:
(e) The account maintaining branch of the drawee AD Category-I bank should
credit foreign currency vostro account of the Exchange House on receipt of
confirmation regarding credit to their nostro account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to credit foreign currency vostro account of the exchange house on receipt of confirmation regarding credit to their nostro account

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that foreign currency accounts are funded at all times
controls.control_description:
(f) AD Category-I banks should ensure that foreign currency accounts are funded
at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that foreign currency accounts are funded at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate to the account maintaining branch by any electronic the name of the ad category-i bank with interest thereon at market related rates payab
controls.control_description:
(g) If the arrangement is under the Non-DDA procedure, the Exchange House
should communicate to the account maintaining branch by any electronic
the name of the AD Category-I bank with interest thereon at market related rates payable to the Exchange House placing the deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate to the account maintaining branch by any electronic the name of the ad category-i bank with interest thereon at market related rates payab

controls.control_objective: To ensure be periodically reviewed and properly monitored by the ad category-i banks
controls.control_description:
The amount of deposit and guarantee should be periodically reviewed and properly monitored by the AD Category-I banks."
mode, the number and aggregate value of drafts drawn in foreign currency
before close of the following working day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be periodically reviewed and properly monitored by the ad category-i banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained frequently, at least on a bi-weekly basis
controls.control_description:
Under DDA procedure, such
information may be obtained frequently, at least on a bi-weekly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained frequently, at least on a bi-weekly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep a deposit of not less than usd 50,000 with the drawee ad category-i bank
controls.control_description:
(h) Collateral cover: Exchange Houses should keep a deposit of not less than USD
50,000 with the drawee AD Category-I bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep a deposit of not less than usd 50,000 with the drawee ad category-i bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed every six months on the basis of operations under this arrangement and if necessary the exchange house should increase the quantum of the
controls.control_description:
Adequacy of quantum of deposit
kept with the bank should be reviewed every six months on the basis of
operations under this arrangement and if necessary the Exchange House
should increase the quantum of the deposit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed every six months on the basis of operations under this arrangement and if necessary the exchange house should increase the quantum of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow interest on this deposit at an appropriate rate
controls.control_description:
AD Category-I banks should allow
interest on this deposit at an appropriate rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow interest on this deposit at an appropriate rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be kept under foreign currency draft drawing arrangements and non-dda procedure of rupee drawing arrangement in india with the account maintaining
controls.control_description:
(i) AD Category-I banks are allowed to keep the amount of deposit required to be
kept under foreign currency draft drawing arrangements and Non-DDA
procedure of Rupee Drawing Arrangement in India with the Account
maintaining branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be kept under foreign currency draft drawing arrangements and non-dda procedure of rupee drawing arrangement in india with the account maintaining

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the know your customer (kyc)/ anti money laundering (aml) / combating the financing of terrorism (cft) guidelines issued by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(a) AD Category-I banks should adhere to the Know Your Customer (KYC)/ Anti
Money Laundering (AML) / Combating the Financing of Terrorism (CFT)
Guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank, while undertaking any transaction
under Rupee/ Foreign Currency Drawing Arrangements, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to the know your customer (kyc)/ anti money laundering (aml) / combating the financing of terrorism (cft) guidelines issued by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure include in their concurrent audit the rupee/ foreign currency drawing arrangement to ensure that credit of funds to the vostro account of the exchange
controls.control_description:
(b) AD Category-I banks should include in their concurrent audit the Rupee/
Foreign Currency Drawing Arrangement to ensure that credit of funds to the
vostro account of the Exchange House takes place before payments are
made to the beneficiaries.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include in their concurrent audit the rupee/ foreign currency drawing arrangement to ensure that credit of funds to the vostro account of the exchange

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a 'due diligence' exercise in respect of remittances received through rupee/ foreign currency drawing arrangements so that regulations relat
controls.control_description:
(c) AD Category-I banks should undertake a 'due diligence' exercise in respect
of remittances received through Rupee/ Foreign Currency Drawing
Arrangements so that regulations relating to anti-money laundering
standards are complied with scrupulously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a 'due diligence' exercise in respect of remittances received through rupee/ foreign currency drawing arrangements so that regulations relat

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for an annual compliance report from the exchange houses duly certified by their auditors that they are adhering to the home country kyc/ aml/ cf
controls.control_description:
AD Category-I banks should call
for an annual compliance report from the Exchange Houses duly certified by
their auditors that they are adhering to the home country KYC/ AML/ CFT
regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to call for an annual compliance report from the exchange houses duly certified by their auditors that they are adhering to the home country kyc/ aml/ cf

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the reserve bank informed of the unusual feature(s) in the operations of the rupee/ foreign currency drawing arrangement by exercising constant v
controls.control_description:
(d) AD Category-I banks should keep the Reserve Bank informed of the unusual
feature(s) in the operations of the Rupee/ Foreign Currency Drawing
Arrangement by exercising constant vigil in the matter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the reserve bank informed of the unusual feature(s) in the operations of the rupee/ foreign currency drawing arrangement by exercising constant v

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that licenses of the exchange houses, which have expired are renewed and copies of authenticated english versions placed with them for their re
controls.control_description:
(e) AD Category-I banks shall ensure that licenses of the Exchange Houses,
which have expired are renewed and copies of authenticated English
versions placed with them for their record.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that licenses of the exchange houses, which have expired are renewed and copies of authenticated english versions placed with them for their re

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into any arrangement with service providers for their back office operations in india such as issuance of drawing advices and stop payment instr
controls.control_description:
(f) The Exchange Houses should not enter into any arrangement with service
providers for their back office operations in India such as issuance of
drawing advices and stop payment instructions on their behalf and AD
Category-I banks should not act on the instructions of such service
providers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into any arrangement with service providers for their back office operations in india such as issuance of drawing advices and stop payment instr

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain approval of the reserve bank for maintaining accounts of exchange houses whose name and constitution, etc
controls.control_description:
(g) AD Category-I banks should obtain approval of the Reserve Bank for
maintaining accounts of Exchange Houses whose name and constitution,
etc., undergo changes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain approval of the reserve bank for maintaining accounts of exchange houses whose name and constitution, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place adequate internal controls and a system of monitoring of accounts as per the extant instructions
controls.control_description:
(a) AD Category-I banks should put in place adequate internal controls and a
system of monitoring of accounts as per the extant instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place adequate internal controls and a system of monitoring of accounts as per the extant instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly on credit basis at all times and no overdraft should be granted to the account holders
controls.control_description:
Dealings with
Exchange Houses should be strictly on credit basis at all times and no overdraft
should be granted to the account holders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly on credit basis at all times and no overdraft should be granted to the account holders

controls.control_objective: To ensure to cause inspection of the vostro accounts of exchange houses on a half-yearly basis through experienced officers
controls.control_description:
(b) Self-inspection of the vostro accounts of Exchange Houses: AD Category-I
banks are required to cause inspection of the vostro accounts of Exchange
Houses on a half-yearly basis through experienced officers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to cause inspection of the vostro accounts of exchange houses on a half-yearly basis through experienced officers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carefully gone through by the competent authorities in ad category-i banks so that prompt corrective action is initiated
controls.control_description:
The inspection
reports should be carefully gone through by the competent authorities in AD
Category-I banks so that prompt corrective action is initiated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carefully gone through by the competent authorities in ad category-i banks so that prompt corrective action is initiated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in the annual review of the accounts submitted to the board
controls.control_description:
Observations
thereon shall be included in the annual review of the accounts submitted to the
Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in the annual review of the accounts submitted to the board

controls.control_description: (DIR Series) Circular No.102 May 21, 2015 16.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 21, 2015 16
